294 I3700_ARTHTS_CD I3700_ARTHTS_CD I3700 Active Diagnoses: Arthritis Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of arthritis (e.g., degenerative joint disease (DJD), osteoarthritis, and rheumatoid arthritis (RA)) in the last seven days. -=Not
